title: senecio doronicum subsp. glaberrimus
intro: Senecio doronicum subsp. glaberrimus, also known as the yellow ragwort or yellow dandelion, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio doronicum subsp. glaberrimus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine, although it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
